info.title: How It Works
info.subtitle: A full breakdown of every score, flag, and label — no black boxes

playerScore.heading: Player Prediction Score (0 – 10)
playerScore.intro: Every player receives a Predicted Score representing their expected performance in the upcoming match. We compute 7 independent components (each 0–10), combine them with position- and sub-role-specific weights, then apply a sample-size confidence dampening and a venue advantage modifier.

form.desc:
Season average match rating blended with recent form.
• Outfield: 60% season + 40% last-3-games — rewards current momentum while keeping seasonal stability.
• GK: 50 / 50 — recent clean sheets and blunders are more predictive game-to-game for keepers.
• Fallback: 6.0 if no rating data is available.

attack.desc:
Goal-scoring threat via three independent signals blended 60% season / 40% recent:
• xG per 90 with position-specific scaling (FWD ×14 cap 10 | MID ×14 cap 8 | DEF ×10 cap 5 | GK ×6 cap 3)
• Conversion bonus (0–2): rewards clinical finishers whose goals exceed their xG.
• Shot volume (0–2): shots on target per 90, regardless of xG quality.

creativity.desc:
Fully position-specific:
• DEF — key passes per 90 (build-up quality) + assist delivery bonus. Typical CB ≈ 2; attacking FB ≈ 8.
• MID — xA per 90 (×16, cap 8) + assist bonus + xA-per-key-pass quality + pass accuracy bonus (72%→0, 88%→2).
• FWD — xA per 90 + assist bonus + key pass quality (without the pass accuracy bonus).

defensive.desc:
Position-specific signals:
• GK: save rate (0–7) + goals conceded per game (0–2) + recent save-rate trend (±1.5) + save volume (0–0.5) + pass accuracy (0–1.0).
• DEF: duel win rate (0–4.5) + tackle win rate (0–4.0) + tackle activity (0–1.5) + pass accuracy (0–1.5).
• MID: duel win rate (0–5) + tackle win rate (0–3) + floor of 1.0.
• FWD: hold-up play via duel win rate only (range 1–6).

availability.desc:
Average minutes per game vs a full 90 — detects rotation risk and injury absences.
Blended 50% season / 50% recent. A player averaging 88 min all season but subbed at 45 for 3 games drops from ~8.6 to ~7.2 — a meaningful rotation signal.

discipline.desc:
Starts at 10; each yellow card per game costs 5 points, each red card costs 15.
Blended 40% season + 60% recent — suspension risk is driven by recent behaviour.

opponent.desc:
Player’s historical performance against the next opponent. Uses match ratings (and G+A where ratings are missing) across all past meetings.
Formula: 5.0 + (avgRatingVsOpponent − 6.5) × 5.0, clamped 1–10.
Defaults to 5.0 (neutral) when no prior history exists.

playerScore.subRoleIntro: We only store four positions (GK / DEF / MID / FWD) but real footballers play very different roles. The engine infers a sub-role from the player’s actual stat signature and adjusts weights accordingly.
playerScore.venueDesc:
After the weighted score is computed and confidence-dampened, a venue modifier is applied:
Home: +0.25 × confidence  |  Away: −0.20 × confidence
playerScore.confidenceDesc:
Per-90 stats become unstable with few games played. We pull the raw score toward a neutral 5.5:
Confidence = min(1.0, 0.55 + (gamesPlayed − 3) × 0.0265)

3 games → 55% actual + 45% neutral  |  10 games → 87% actual  |  20+ games → 100% actual
playerScore.penaltiesIntro: Players who haven’t played recently are dragged toward a below-neutral baseline of 2.5. Formula: score × factor + 2.5 × (1 − factor).

inactivity.desc:
Based on days since last match:
• 0–14 days: factor = 1.00
• 14–28 days: factor 1.00 → 0.70
• 28–56 days: factor 0.70 → 0.35
• 56+ days: factor = 0.35

lowMinutes.desc:
Based on avg minutes per game in last 3 appearances:
• ≥ 60 min/game: factor = 1.00
• 45–60 min/game: factor 1.00 → 0.85
• 30–45 min/game: factor 0.85 → 0.60
• < 30 min/game: factor = 0.40

playerScore.note: On the player profile page, Prediction Controls scale Form / Threat / Opponent / Minutes / Home-Away and then renormalize. The league grids use default controls.

riskLevels.heading: Risk Levels
riskLevels.intro: Each player is assigned a risk level based on their predicted score.

low.label: Low Risk
low.desc: Safe to start — strong form, regular minutes, good matchup.

medium.label: Medium Risk
medium.desc: Proceed with caution — decent pick but some uncertainty.

high.label: High Risk
high.desc: Consider benching — poor form, rotation risk, or tough fixture.

riskLevels.note: When viewing All Positions, scores are first normalized within each position group before ranking, so GKs and FWDs compete fairly.

hiddenGems.heading: Hidden Gems
hiddenGems.intro: Hidden Gems are undervalued players whose underlying metrics outpace their visible returns. Score between 4.5 and 8.0. Any single one of 7 signals qualifies them:

1.title: xG+xA outpacing G+A
1.desc: expected output ≥ 0.25/90 and exceeds actual returns by 40%+.

2.title: High shot volume, conversion hasn’t clicked
2.desc: ≥ 15 total shots but goals below 22% of shots on target.

3.title: Creative but unrewarded
3.desc: Creativity score ≥ 5.0 but assists are below 15% of key passes.

4.title: High threat, few returns
4.desc: Attack component ≥ 5.0 but G+A total below position low-return threshold (DEF: 4 | MID: 6 | FWD: 8).

5.title: Premium shot positions
5.desc: xG per shot ≥ 0.12 across ≥ 6 shots but below the goals threshold.

6.title: Improving trajectory
6.desc: Recent xG+xA/90 is ≥ 30% above the season average (requires ≥ 3 recent games).

7.title: Position-specific specialist quality
7.desc:
GK: ≥ 3.0 saves/game + ≥ 68% save rate.
DEF: ≥ 87% pass accuracy + ≥ 52% duel win rate.
MID: ≥ 5 duels/90 + creativity ≥ 4.5.
FWD: xG per shot ≥ 0.16 across ≥ 10 shots.

hiddenGems.note: Hidden Gems appear separately from Top Picks so the two groups never overlap.

redFlags.heading: Red Flags
redFlags.intro: Red Flags highlight players showing alarming declines. Only players with 270+ minutes overall (or 45+ in recent view) are assessed.

1.title: Form Decline
1.desc: takes the worse of: absolute distance below the 7.0 baseline and relative drop from season average.

2.title: Output Drop
2.desc: G+A per 90 vs position baselines (DEF: 0.10 | MID: 0.22 | FWD: 0.35).

3.title: xG+xA Decline
3.desc: expected threat per 90 falling vs the season average.

4.title: Shot Accuracy Decline
4.desc: shots-on-target rate falling vs the season average (requires ≥ 10 total shots).

5.title: Involvement Decline
5.desc: pass accuracy falling vs the season average (requires ≥ 20 total passes).

6.title: Discipline Risk
6.desc: recent period only. Each yellow card scores 2.5; each red scores 8.0 (capped at 10).

7.title: GK-Specific: Save Rate & Conceding
7.desc: recent save rate falling vs the season average, plus penalty when conceding ≥ 2.5 goals/game recently.

8.title: DEF: Duel Win Rate Decline
8.desc: season vs recent duel win rate (requires ≥ 15 season duels + ≥ 4 recent).

9.title: MID: Key Pass Decline
9.desc: key passes per 90 falling sharply vs season average (requires ≥ 8 total key passes).

10.title: FWD: xG Per Shot Decline
10.desc: shot quality falling vs season average (requires ≥ 10 season shots + ≥ 3 recent).

benchwarmers.heading: Benchwarmers
benchwarmers.intro: Benchwarmers are consistent, reliable players. They must not be Hidden Gems or Red Flags, and need 270+ minutes overall (or 45+ recent).

availability.desc: Average minutes per game vs a full 90. A starter playing every minute scores 10.

formConsistency.desc: Two sub-signals (60/40): band score (proximity to the 6.0–7.5 reliable band) and stability score (recent form vs season average).

outputReliability.desc: Proximity to a moderate G+A/90 baseline — too far above OR below reduces the score.

passingReliability.desc: Pass accuracy proximity to a position-specific target.

discipline.desc: Card rate per game — reliable players stay on the pitch.

matchPredictions.heading: Match Predictions
matchPredictions.intro: Match outcome probabilities are powered by a machine-learning model trained on historical match data.

homeWin.label: Home Win %
homeWin.desc: Probability the home side wins in 90 minutes

draw.label: Draw %
draw.desc: Probability the match ends level after 90 minutes

awayWin.label: Away Win %
awayWin.desc: Probability the away side wins in 90 minutes

over25.label: Over 2.5 Goals %
over25.desc: Probability the match has 3 or more goals in total

btts.label: Both Teams Score %
btts.desc: Probability both teams find the net at least once

synergy.heading: Synergy
synergy.intro: The Synergy tool lets you evaluate a group of players together. Picking players from different positions adds a diversity bonus.
synergy.note: A squad covering all four position types (GK, DEF, MID, FWD) earns a +1.5 bonus. This rewards balanced squads over stacking one position.
